stemHtml: Considering bank angle and engine thrust, what limits are to be taken into account when defining VMC (minimum control speed with critical engine inoperative)?

options.a: Not more than 5° of bank, idle thrust.
options.b: Not more than 15° of bank, maximum available take-off thrust.
options.c: Not more than 5° of bank, maximum available take-off thrust.
options.d: Not more than 15° of bank, idle thrust.
